overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a player character with pink hair and a green cloak walking through a gothic castle hallway. The character passes by a translucent ghost, ornate wooden furniture, and other characters in a richly detailed stone corridor with warm natural lighting filtering through tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with ghostly encounter

events.description: translucent ghost of a bearded man in ruff collar materializes in the center of the hallway
ghost fades away and disappears from view as the character passes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone corridor following another character in dark academic robes

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes walking ahead down the corridor
translucent ghost standing in the hallway before fading away

entered.detail: ornate dark wood cabinet with gold accents and decorative items on top
classical white marble bust statue on a dark wooden pedestal
large arched window with multiple panes at the end of the corridor
gothic stone archway with wooden door

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gothic castle corridor with the player character following a figure in dark robes. A translucent ghost materializes in the center of the hall near an ornate wooden dresser and white marble bust, then fades away as the character approaches. Warm light filters through a tall window at the corridor's end.

events.description: passing the initial furniture area into the section with large potted plants

agents.ego_description: continuing down the hallway, approaching and passing a large decorative ceramic planter

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes maintaining distance ahead

entered.detail: large blue and white decorated ceramic pot containing a tall palm plant
dark wooden bench along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the initial furniture area into a section featuring a large blue and white ceramic planter with a palm plant on the left. The corridor continues with polished marble floors reflecting the natural light from the approaching window. A wooden bench becomes visible along the right wall as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor seating area approaching the window

events.description: two seated figures become visible on the wooden bench to the right
approaching the large gothic window at the end of the corridor with red carpet visible

agents.ego_description: walking past seated figures on a bench and approaching the large window at the corridor's end

notable_agents.action: two figures sitting on the wooden bench engaged in conversation

entered.detail: large red and gold framed tapestry hanging on the stone wall
rectangular red patterned rug placed in front of the tall window

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character passing two seated figures on a wooden bench to the right, with a large wall tapestry visible on the left. The corridor opens slightly as the character approaches the tall gothic window at the end, walking onto a red patterned rug that lies on the polished marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle corridor that transitions from a ghostly encounter to a brightly lit hall. It begins with the player character following a robed figure past an ornate wooden dresser and a marble bust, where a translucent ghost materializes and fades away. As the character progresses, the scene shifts toward a section of polished marble floors featuring a large blue and white ceramic planter with a palm plant and a wooden bench along the wall. The camera then continues past two seated figures and a large wall tapestry, moving onto a red patterned rug. Finally, the corridor opens up as the character approaches the tall gothic window at the end, where warm natural light floods the space.
